name: Impossible Travel Detection
description: Detects account compromise via geolocation anomaly: same user logs in from geographically distant locations in unrealistically short time (> 900 km/h travel speed)
false_positive_guidance: Users accessing via VPN endpoints in different locations
Corporate proxy routing through multiple countries
Cloud NAT gateways appearing as different locations
remediation_steps: 1. Contact the user via a secondary channel to verify activity
2. Check if user uses VPN or corporate proxy (check both IPs)
3. If unauthorized: lock account and force password reset immediately
4. Review all activity from both source IPs in the time window
5. Enable MFA if not already enabled
6. Review other services accessed with the same credentials
